sections.paragraph:
adv. (from חֵן the syllable ־ָם, with which adverbs are formed)-

(1) gratis, gratuitously, for nothing, Gen 29:15 Exo 21:2 2Sa 24:24 without reward, Job 1:9.

(2) in vain, Pro 1:17 more fully אֶל־חִנָּם (Germ. für umfonft), Eze 6:10. Compare δωρεάν, N. Test. gratis, in vain, and frustra, in Plautus, for gratis.

(3) without cause, rashly, undeservedly. Job 2:3 9:17 Psa 35:7 1Ki 2:31, דְּמֵי־חִנָּם innocent blood; Pro 26:2 compare Lehrgeb. p. 827.

[“חָנַם an unused and doubtful root, whence the two following words.”]
